action_mappings.assign_ledger_account_to_case: assign ledger account {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.unassign_ledger_account_from_case: unassign ledger account {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.assign_case_to_suspense_bucket: assign reconciliation case {} to suspense bucket {}
action_mappings.release_case_from_suspense_bucket: release reconciliation case {} from suspense bucket {}
action_mappings.confirm_initial_validation: confirm initial validation for reconciliation case {} in suspense bucket {}
action_mappings.record_communication_verification: record communication verification for reconciliation case {} using communication reference {}
action_mappings.verify_evidence_by_authorized_verifier: verify evidence for reconciliation case {} in suspense bucket {} by authorized verifier {}
action_mappings.verify_evidence_with_document: verify evidence for reconciliation case {} using supporting document {}
action_mappings.assign_remediation_activity_to_case: assign remediation activity {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.release_remediation_activity_from_case: release remediation activity {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.assign_source_system_to_case: assign source system {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.release_source_system_from_case: release source system {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.assign_escalation_option_to_case: assign escalation option {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.release_escalation_option_from_case: release escalation option {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.assign_exception_reason_to_case: assign exception reason code {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.release_exception_reason_from_case: release exception reason code {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.apply_clearance_instruction: apply clearance instruction {} to reconciliation case {} with remediation activity {} from source system {}
action_mappings.execute_clearance_with_escalation_and_au: execute clearance instruction {} with escalation option {} and audit ticket {} for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.finalize_posting_and_release_followup: finalize posting and release follow-up for reconciliation case {} with remediation activity {} in source system {}
action_mappings.record_approval: record approval for reconciliation case {} with remediation activity {} in source system {} by resolver unit {}
action_mappings.record_escalated_approval: record escalated approval for reconciliation case {} with escalation option {} and exception reason code {} by approver unit {}
action_mappings.commit_resolution_and_clear_flags: commit resolution and clear flags for reconciliation case {} with remediation activity {} from source system {}
action_mappings.reverify_after_commit: reverify evidence for reconciliation case {} in suspense bucket {} with authorized verifier {} after commit
action_mappings.flag_supporting_document_required: flag reconciliation case {} in suspense bucket {} as requiring supporting document
action_mappings.link_communication_reference: link communication reference {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.assign_supporting_document_to_case: assign supporting document {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.link_supporting_document_across_cases: link supporting document {} across system initiated case {} and client initiated case {}
action_mappings.synchronize_supporting_documents_between: synchronize supporting documents for reconciliation case {} in suspense bucket {} with authorized verifier {}
action_mappings.close_case_with_standard_checks: close reconciliation case {} with standard checks
action_mappings.close_case_after_documented_clearance: close reconciliation case {} after documented clearance with supporting document {}
action_mappings.close_case_after_evidence_synchronizatio: close reconciliation case {} after evidence synchronization

action_mappings_indef.assign_ledger_account_to_case: assign a ledger account {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unassign_ledger_account_from_case: unassign a ledger account {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_case_to_suspense_bucket: assign a reconciliation case {} to a suspense bucket {}
action_mappings_indef.release_case_from_suspense_bucket: release a reconciliation case {} from a suspense bucket {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_initial_validation: confirm initial validation for a reconciliation case {} in a suspense bucket {}
action_mappings_indef.record_communication_verification: record communication verification for a reconciliation case {} using a communication reference {}
action_mappings_indef.verify_evidence_by_authorized_verifier: verify evidence for a reconciliation case {} in a suspense bucket {} by an authorized verifier {}
action_mappings_indef.verify_evidence_with_document: verify evidence for a reconciliation case {} using a supporting document {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_remediation_activity_to_case: assign a remediation activity {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_remediation_activity_from_case: release a remediation activity {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_source_system_to_case: assign a source system {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_source_system_from_case: release a source system {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_escalation_option_to_case: assign an escalation option {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_escalation_option_from_case: release an escalation option {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_exception_reason_to_case: assign an exception reason code {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_exception_reason_from_case: release an exception reason code {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_clearance_instruction: apply a clearance instruction {} to a reconciliation case {} with a remediation activity {} from a source system {}
action_mappings_indef.execute_clearance_with_escalation_and_au: execute a clearance instruction {} with an escalation option {} and an audit ticket {} for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.finalize_posting_and_release_followup: finalize posting and release follow-up for a reconciliation case {} with a remediation activity {} in a source system {}
action_mappings_indef.record_approval: record approval for a reconciliation case {} with a remediation activity {} in a source system {} by a resolver unit {}
action_mappings_indef.record_escalated_approval: record escalated approval for a reconciliation case {} with an escalation option {} and an exception reason code {} by an approver unit {}
action_mappings_indef.commit_resolution_and_clear_flags: commit resolution and clear flags for a reconciliation case {} with a remediation activity {} from a source system {}
action_mappings_indef.reverify_after_commit: reverify evidence for a reconciliation case {} in a suspense bucket {} with an authorized verifier {} after commit
action_mappings_indef.flag_supporting_document_required: flag a reconciliation case {} in a suspense bucket {} as requiring supporting document
action_mappings_indef.link_communication_reference: link a communication reference {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_supporting_document_to_case: assign a supporting document {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.link_supporting_document_across_cases: link a supporting document {} across a system initiated case {} and a client initiated case {}
action_mappings_indef.synchronize_supporting_documents_between: synchronize supporting documents for a reconciliation case {} in a suspense bucket {} with an authorized verifier {}
action_mappings_indef.close_case_with_standard_checks: close a reconciliation case {} with standard checks
action_mappings_indef.close_case_after_documented_clearance: close a reconciliation case {} after documented clearance with a supporting document {}
action_mappings_indef.close_case_after_evidence_synchronizatio: close a reconciliation case {} after evidence synchronization

predicate_mappings.case_linked_ledger_account: the case {} is linked to the ledger account {}
predicate_mappings.case_account_claimed: the account for case {} is claimed
predicate_mappings.case_initial_validation_passed: the initial validation for case {} has passed
predicate_mappings.case_evidence_verified: the evidence for case {} has been verified
predicate_mappings.case_assigned_remediation: case {} has been assigned remediation activity {}
predicate_mappings.case_assigned_source_system: case {} has been assigned to source system {}
predicate_mappings.case_assigned_escalation_option: case {} has been assigned escalation option {}
predicate_mappings.case_assigned_exception_code: case {} has been assigned exception code {}
predicate_mappings.case_document_association_candidate: {} is a candidate for association with {}
predicate_mappings.case_account_candidate: {} is a candidate for the account {}
predicate_mappings.case_instruction_candidate: {} is a candidate for the instruction {}
predicate_mappings.case_remediation_candidate: {} is a candidate for the remediation activity {}
predicate_mappings.case_source_candidate: {} is a candidate from the source system {}
predicate_mappings.case_escalation_candidate: {} is a candidate for escalation with the option {}
predicate_mappings.case_audit_ticket_candidate: {} is a candidate for an audit ticket {}
predicate_mappings.case_exception_code_candidate: {} is a candidate for the exception reason code {}
predicate_mappings.case_organizational_unit_candidate: {} is a candidate for the organizational unit {}
predicate_mappings.case_supporting_document_candidate: {} is a candidate for the supporting document {}
predicate_mappings.case_assigned_suspense_bucket: {} is assigned to the suspense bucket {}

preconditions: I can only open a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the case A is registered and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I open a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A is registered

assign_ledger_account_to_case.description: assign a ledger account B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only assign a ledger account B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the account B
I can only assign a ledger account B to a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the account for case A is claimed
effects: Once I assign a ledger account B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A is linked to the ledger account B and the account for case A is claimed
Once I assign a ledger account B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unassign_ledger_account_from_case.description: unassign a ledger account B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unassign a ledger account B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is linked to the ledger account B
I can only unassign a ledger account B from a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that case A has executed clearance flag and it is not the case that case approval for A is recorded
effects: Once I unassign a ledger account B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I unassign a ledger account B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is linked to the ledger account B and it is not the case anymore that the account for case A is claimed and it is not the case anymore that the initial validation for case A has passed and it is not the case anymore that the evidence for case A has been verified and it is not the case anymore that A requires approval and it is not the case anymore that A has a committed resolution and it is not the case anymore that A requires follow up

assign_case_to_suspense_bucket.description: assign a reconciliation case A to a suspense bucket B
preconditions: I can only assign a reconciliation case A to a suspense bucket B if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I assign a reconciliation case A to a suspense bucket B, it is the case that A is assigned to the suspense bucket B
Once I assign a reconciliation case A to a suspense bucket B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_case_from_suspense_bucket.description: release a reconciliation case A from a suspense bucket B
preconditions: I can only release a reconciliation case A from a suspense bucket B if it is the case that A is assigned to the suspense bucket B
effects: Once I release a reconciliation case A from a suspense bucket B, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a reconciliation case A from a suspense bucket B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the suspense bucket B

confirm_initial_validation.description: confirm initial validation for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B
preconditions: I can only confirm initial validation for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B if it is the case that the case A is registered and the account for case A is claimed and A is assigned to the suspense bucket B
I can only confirm initial validation for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B if it is not the case that the initial validation for case A has passed
effects: Once I confirm initial validation for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B, it is the case that the initial validation for case A has passed

record_communication_verification.description: record communication verification for a reconciliation case A using a communication reference B
preconditions: I can only record communication verification for a reconciliation case A using a communication reference B if it is the case that the case A is registered and the account for case A is claimed and B is available
I can only record communication verification for a reconciliation case A using a communication reference B if it is not the case that the initial validation for case A has passed
effects: Once I record communication verification for a reconciliation case A using a communication reference B, it is the case that the initial validation for case A has passed and A requires approval
Once I record communication verification for a reconciliation case A using a communication reference B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

verify_evidence_by_authorized_verifier.description: verify evidence for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B by an authorized verifier C
preconditions: I can only verify evidence for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B by an authorized verifier C if it is the case that the initial validation for case A has passed and the account for case A is claimed and A is assigned to the suspense bucket B and C is available
I can only verify evidence for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B by an authorized verifier C if it is not the case that the evidence for case A has been verified
effects: Once I verify evidence for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B by an authorized verifier C, it is the case that the evidence for case A has been verified
Once I verify evidence for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B by an authorized verifier C, it is not the case anymore that A requires approval

verify_evidence_with_document.description: verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting document B
preconditions: I can only verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting document B if it is the case that the account for case A is claimed and B is linked to A
I can only verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting document B if it is not the case that the evidence for case A has been verified
effects: Once I verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting document B, it is the case that the evidence for case A has been verified
Once I verify evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting document B, it is not the case anymore that A requires approval

assign_remediation_activity_to_case.description: assign a remediation activity B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only assign a remediation activity B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the remediation activity B
effects: Once I assign a remediation activity B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that case A has been assigned remediation activity B
Once I assign a remediation activity B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_remediation_activity_from_case.description: release a remediation activity B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only release a remediation activity B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that case A has been assigned remediation activity B
effects: Once I release a remediation activity B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a remediation activity B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that case A has been assigned remediation activity B

assign_source_system_to_case.description: assign a source system B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only assign a source system B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate from the source system B
effects: Once I assign a source system B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that case A has been assigned to source system B
Once I assign a source system B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_source_system_from_case.description: release a source system B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only release a source system B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that case A has been assigned to source system B
effects: Once I release a source system B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a source system B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that case A has been assigned to source system B

assign_escalation_option_to_case.description: assign an escalation option B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only assign an escalation option B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for escalation with the option B
effects: Once I assign an escalation option B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that case A has been assigned escalation option B
Once I assign an escalation option B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_escalation_option_from_case.description: release an escalation option B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only release an escalation option B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that case A has been assigned escalation option B
effects: Once I release an escalation option B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an escalation option B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that case A has been assigned escalation option B

assign_exception_reason_to_case.description: assign an exception reason code B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only assign an exception reason code B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the exception reason code B
effects: Once I assign an exception reason code B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that case A has been assigned exception code B
Once I assign an exception reason code B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_exception_reason_from_case.description: release an exception reason code B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only release an exception reason code B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that case A has been assigned exception code B
effects: Once I release an exception reason code B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an exception reason code B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that case A has been assigned exception code B

apply_clearance_instruction.description: apply a clearance instruction B to a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity C from a source system D
preconditions: I can only apply a clearance instruction B to a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity C from a source system D if it is the case that the account for case A is claimed and case A has been assigned remediation activity C and case A has been assigned to source system D and B is available and A is a candidate for the instruction B
I can only apply a clearance instruction B to a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity C from a source system D if it is not the case that case A has executed clearance flag
effects: Once I apply a clearance instruction B to a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity C from a source system D, it is the case that case A has applied clearance instruction B and case A has executed clearance flag
Once I apply a clearance instruction B to a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity C from a source system D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

execute_clearance_with_escalation_and_au.description: execute a clearance instruction B with an escalation option C and an audit ticket D for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only execute a clearance instruction B with an escalation option C and an audit ticket D for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the account for case A is claimed and case A has been assigned escalation option C and D is available and B is available and A is a candidate for the instruction B and A is a candidate for an audit ticket D
I can only execute a clearance instruction B with an escalation option C and an audit ticket D for a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that case A has executed clearance flag
effects: Once I execute a clearance instruction B with an escalation option C and an audit ticket D for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that case A has applied clearance instruction B and case A has executed clearance flag and A requires follow up and A requires approval

Once I execute a clearance instruction B with an escalation option C and an audit ticket D for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

finalize_posting_and_release_followup.description: finalize posting and release follow up for a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity B in a source system C
preconditions: I can only finalize posting and release follow up for a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity B in a source system C if it is the case that case A has executed clearance flag and A requires follow up and case A has been assigned remediation activity B and case A has been assigned to source system C
effects: Once I finalize posting and release follow up for a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity B in a source system C, it is not the case anymore that A requires follow up and it is not the case anymore that A requires approval

record_approval.description: record approval for a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity B in a source system C by a resolver unit D
preconditions: I can only record approval for a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity B in a source system C by a resolver unit D if it is the case that the evidence for case A has been verified and case A has executed clearance flag and case A has been assigned remediation activity B and case A has been assigned to source system C and A is a candidate for the organizational unit D

I can only record approval for a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity B in a source system C by a resolver unit D if it is not the case that A requires approval and it is not the case that case approval for A is recorded
effects: Once I record approval for a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity B in a source system C by a resolver unit D, it is the case that case approval for A is recorded

record_escalated_approval.description: record escalated approval for a reconciliation case A with an escalation option B and an exception reason code C by an approver unit D
preconditions: I can only record escalated approval for a reconciliation case A with an escalation option B and an exception reason code C by an approver unit D if it is the case that the evidence for case A has been verified and case A has executed clearance flag and case A has been assigned escalation option B and case A has been assigned exception code C and A is a candidate for the organizational unit D

I can only record escalated approval for a reconciliation case A with an escalation option B and an exception reason code C by an approver unit D if it is not the case that case approval for A is recorded
effects: Once I record escalated approval for a reconciliation case A with an escalation option B and an exception reason code C by an approver unit D, it is the case that case approval for A is recorded and A requires approval

commit_resolution_and_clear_flags.description: commit resolution and clear flags for a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity B from a source system C
preconditions: I can only commit resolution and clear flags for a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity B from a source system C if it is the case that case approval for A is recorded and A requires approval and case A has been assigned remediation activity B and case A has been assigned to source system C
effects: Once I commit resolution and clear flags for a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity B from a source system C, it is the case that A has a committed resolution

Once I commit resolution and clear flags for a reconciliation case A with a remediation activity B from a source system C, it is not the case anymore that A requires approval and it is not the case anymore that the evidence for case A has been verified and it is not the case anymore that A requires follow up

reverify_after_commit.description: reverify evidence for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B with an authorized verifier C after commit
preconditions: I can only reverify evidence for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B with an authorized verifier C after commit if it is the case that A has a committed resolution and case approval for A is recorded and the account for case A is claimed and A is assigned to the suspense bucket B and C is available
I can only reverify evidence for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B with an authorized verifier C after commit if it is not the case that the evidence for case A has been verified
effects: Once I reverify evidence for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B with an authorized verifier C after commit, it is the case that the evidence for case A has been verified

flag_supporting_document_required.description: flag a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B as requiring supporting document
preconditions: I can only flag a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B as requiring supporting document if it is the case that case approval for A is recorded and the evidence for case A has been verified and A is assigned to the suspense bucket B
I can only flag a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B as requiring supporting document if it is not the case that A requires approval and it is not the case that A has supporting evidence
effects: Once I flag a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B as requiring supporting document, it is the case that A has supporting evidence

link_communication_reference.description: link a communication reference B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a communication reference B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that case approval for A is recorded and the evidence for case A has been verified and B is available
I can only link a communication reference B to a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A requires approval and it is not the case that A has supporting evidence
effects: Once I link a communication reference B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A has supporting evidence
Once I link a communication reference B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_supporting_document_to_case.description: assign a supporting document B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only assign a supporting document B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A has supporting evidence and B is available and A references the document B
effects: Once I assign a supporting document B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is a candidate for the supporting document B
Once I assign a supporting document B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

link_supporting_document_across_cases.description: link a supporting document C across a system initiated case A and a client initiated case B
preconditions: I can only link a supporting document C across a system initiated case A and a client initiated case B if it is the case that the case A is registered and A is from the system origin and C is a candidate for association with A and B is a candidate for the supporting document C
I can only link a supporting document C across a system initiated case A and a client initiated case B if it is not the case that C is linked to A
effects: Once I link a supporting document C across a system initiated case A and a client initiated case B, it is the case that C is linked to A

synchronize_supporting_documents_between.description: synchronize supporting documents for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B with an authorized verifier C
preconditions: I can only synchronize supporting documents for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B with an authorized verifier C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A is from the system origin and the evidence for case A has been verified and A has supporting evidence and A is assigned to the suspense bucket B and C is available
I can only synchronize supporting documents for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B with an authorized verifier C if it is not the case that documentation for A is confirmed
effects: Once I synchronize supporting documents for a reconciliation case A in a suspense bucket B with an authorized verifier C, it is the case that documentation for A is confirmed

close_case_with_standard_checks.description: close a reconciliation case A with standard checks
preconditions: I can only close a reconciliation case A with standard checks if it is the case that A is from the client origin and the case A is registered and the account for case A is claimed and case A has executed clearance flag and case approval for A is recorded and A has supporting evidence and the evidence for case A has been verified
I can only close a reconciliation case A with standard checks if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a reconciliation case A with standard checks, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_after_documented_clearance.description: close a reconciliation case A after documented clearance with a supporting document B
preconditions: I can only close a reconciliation case A after documented clearance with a supporting document B if it is the case that A is from the system origin and the case A is registered and the account for case A is claimed and case A has executed clearance flag and case approval for A is recorded and A has supporting evidence and the evidence for case A has been verified and B is linked to A
I can only close a reconciliation case A after documented clearance with a supporting document B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a reconciliation case A after documented clearance with a supporting document B, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_after_evidence_synchronizatio.description: close a reconciliation case A after evidence synchronization
preconditions: I can only close a reconciliation case A after evidence synchronization if it is the case that A is from the system origin and the case A is registered and the account for case A is claimed and case A has executed clearance flag and case approval for A is recorded and A has supporting evidence and the evidence for case A has been verified and documentation for A is confirmed
I can only close a reconciliation case A after evidence synchronization if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a reconciliation case A after evidence synchronization, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.assign_ledger_account_to_case: assign ledger account {?ledger_account} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.unassign_ledger_account_from_case: unassign ledger account {?ledger_account} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_case_to_suspense_bucket: assign reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} to suspense bucket {?suspense_bucket}
action_nl_templates.release_case_from_suspense_bucket: release reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} from suspense bucket {?suspense_bucket}
action_nl_templates.confirm_initial_validation: confirm initial validation for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} in suspense bucket {?suspense_bucket}
action_nl_templates.record_communication_verification: record communication verification for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using communication reference {?communication_reference}
action_nl_templates.verify_evidence_by_authorized_verifier: verify evidence for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} in suspense bucket {?suspense_bucket} by authorized verifier {?authorized_verifier}
action_nl_templates.verify_evidence_with_document: verify evidence for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using supporting document {?supporting_document}
action_nl_templates.assign_remediation_activity_to_case: assign remediation activity {?remediation_activity} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_remediation_activity_from_case: release remediation activity {?remediation_activity} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_source_system_to_case: assign source system {?source_system} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_source_system_from_case: release source system {?source_system} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_escalation_option_to_case: assign escalation option {?escalation_option} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_escalation_option_from_case: release escalation option {?escalation_option} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_exception_reason_to_case: assign exception reason code {?exception_reason_code} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_exception_reason_from_case: release exception reason code {?exception_reason_code} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_clearance_instruction: apply clearance instruction {?clearance_instruction} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with remediation activity {?remediation_activity} from source system {?source_system}
action_nl_templates.execute_clearance_with_escalation_and_au: execute clearance instruction {?clearance_instruction} with escalation option {?escalation_option} and audit ticket {?audit_ticket} for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.finalize_posting_and_release_followup: finalize posting and release follow-up for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with remediation activity {?remediation_activity} in source system {?source_system}
action_nl_templates.record_approval: record approval for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with remediation activity {?remediation_activity} in source system {?source_system} by resolver unit {?resolver_unit}
action_nl_templates.record_escalated_approval: record escalated approval for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with escalation option {?escalation_option} and exception reason code {?exception_reason_code} by approver unit {?approver_unit}
action_nl_templates.commit_resolution_and_clear_flags: commit resolution and clear flags for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with remediation activity {?remediation_activity} from source system {?source_system}
action_nl_templates.reverify_after_commit: reverify evidence for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} in suspense bucket {?suspense_bucket} with authorized verifier {?authorized_verifier} after commit
action_nl_templates.flag_supporting_document_required: flag reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} in suspense bucket {?suspense_bucket} as requiring supporting document
action_nl_templates.link_communication_reference: link communication reference {?communication_reference} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_supporting_document_to_case: assign supporting document {?supporting_document} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.link_supporting_document_across_cases: link supporting document {?supporting_document} across system initiated case {?system_initiated_case} and client initiated case {?client_initiated_case}
action_nl_templates.synchronize_supporting_documents_between: synchronize supporting documents for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} in suspense bucket {?suspense_bucket} with authorized verifier {?authorized_verifier}
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_standard_checks: close reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with standard checks
action_nl_templates.close_case_after_documented_clearance: close reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} after documented clearance with supporting document {?clearance_instruction}
action_nl_templates.close_case_after_evidence_synchronizatio: close reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} after evidence synchronization

predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_ledger_account: the case {?reconciliation_case} is linked to the ledger account {?ledger_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_account_claimed: the account for case {?reconciliation_case} is claimed
predicate_nl_templates.case_initial_validation_passed: the initial validation for case {?reconciliation_case} has passed
predicate_nl_templates.case_evidence_verified: the evidence for case {?reconciliation_case} has been verified
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_remediation: case {?reconciliation_case} has been assigned remediation activity {?remediation_activity}
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_source_system: case {?reconciliation_case} has been assigned to source system {?source_system}
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_escalation_option: case {?reconciliation_case} has been assigned escalation option {?escalation_option}
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_exception_code: case {?reconciliation_case} has been assigned exception code {?exception_reason_code}
predicate_nl_templates.case_document_association_candidate: {?supporting_document} is a candidate for association with {?reconciliation_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_account_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the account {?ledger_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_instruction_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the instruction {?clearance_instruction}
predicate_nl_templates.case_remediation_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the remediation activity {?remediation_activity}
predicate_nl_templates.case_source_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate from the source system {?source_system}
predicate_nl_templates.case_escalation_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for escalation with the option {?escalation_option}
predicate_nl_templates.case_audit_ticket_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for an audit ticket {?audit_ticket}
predicate_nl_templates.case_exception_code_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the exception reason code {?exception_reason_code}
predicate_nl_templates.case_organizational_unit_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the organizational unit {?organizational_unit}
predicate_nl_templates.case_supporting_document_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the supporting document {?supporting_document}
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_suspense_bucket: {?reconciliation_case} is assigned to the suspense bucket {?suspense_bucket}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_remediation_activity_from_case: release a remediation activity {?remediation_activity} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_source_system_from_case: release a source system {?source_system} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_escalation_option_from_case: release an escalation option {?escalation_option} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_exception_reason_to_case: assign an exception reason code {?exception_reason_code} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_exception_reason_from_case: release an exception reason code {?exception_reason_code} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_clearance_instruction: apply a clearance instruction {?clearance_instruction} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with a remediation activity {?remediation_activity} from a source system {?source_system}

action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_posting_and_release_followup: finalize posting and release follow-up for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with a remediation activity {?remediation_activity} in a source system {?source_system}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_approval: record approval for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with a remediation activity {?remediation_activity} in a source system {?source_system} by a resolver unit {?resolver_unit}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_escalated_approval: record escalated approval for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with an escalation option {?escalation_option} and an exception reason code {?exception_reason_code} by an approver unit {?approver_unit}
action_nl_templates_indef.commit_resolution_and_clear_flags: commit resolution and clear flags for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with a remediation activity {?remediation_activity} from a source system {?source_system}
action_nl_templates_indef.reverify_after_commit: reverify evidence for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} in a suspense bucket {?suspense_bucket} with an authorized verifier {?authorized_verifier} after commit
action_nl_templates_indef.flag_supporting_document_required: flag a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} in a suspense bucket {?suspense_bucket} as requiring supporting document
action_nl_templates_indef.link_communication_reference: link a communication reference {?communication_reference} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_supporting_document_to_case: assign a supporting document {?supporting_document} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_supporting_document_across_cases: link a supporting document {?supporting_document} across a system initiated case {?system_initiated_case} and a client initiated case {?client_initiated_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_standard_checks: close a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with standard checks

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a reconciliation case or a ledger account or a clearance instruction or a source system or a remediation activity or a escalation option or a suspense bucket or a communication reference or a supporting document or a authorized verifier or a audit ticket or a exception reason code or a organizational unit is also a object
Everything that is a resolver unit or a approver unit is also a organizational unit
Everything that is a client initiated case or a system initiated case is also a reconciliation case
